hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); _m=$(jq -r '.model // empty' .claude/settings.json 2>/dev/null); _m=${_m:-$(jq -r '.model // empty' ~/.claude/settings.json 2>/dev/null)}; _m=${_m:-claude-code}; echo "$INPUT" | jq --arg m "$_m" '. + {model: $m}' | curl -sf -X POST "${AI_HOOK_URL}" -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d @- 2>/dev/null || true
